message:
test(fwc): add runtime truth boundary closure verification tests

Add 13 cross-cutting invariant tests proving the live/offline boundary
is mechanically enforced across all command families:
- Every command has a classification and vice versa
- LiveHost commands fail-fast without host
- Hybrid commands never claim authoritative without host
- Hybrid commands with --offline flag resolve to explicit offline
- OfflineArtifact commands stay offline regardless of host presence
- Offline modes always carry provenance markers
- No command silently degrades from live to offline
- Mode consistency validation catches LiveHost + ExplicitOffline misuse
- Live and offline command sets are properly disjoint
- Passthrough commands always resolve to offline

Bead: 1g7z0.29.9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
